title: RottenLeather Fabric
body:
# RottenLeather

This is an unofficial Fabric port of the Forge mod [Rotten Leather.](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rotten-leather)

In this mod, you can transform rotten flesh into leather or even a new food: Flesh Jerky.

Rotten Chunks will sometimes drop from zombies.

## Crafting/Smelting:

Rotten Chunk

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1045797420841304134/1045797465493864448/craft_rotten_chunk.png)

Leather

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1045797420841304134/1045797465795874986/smelt_leather.png)

Sweetened Chunk

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1045797420841304134/1045797464927653968/craft_sweetened_chunk.png)

Flesh Jerky

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1045797420841304134/1045797466412417114/smelt_flesh_jerky.png)

![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1045797420841304134/1045797466093658172/requires_fabric_api.png)
